subcodes.first_line: O scion of that glorious personage! Although for some time this pen hath not written a letter in thy name, yet thy mention hath been constant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل آن شخص جلیل هر چند چندیست که این خامه بنام تو نامه ننگاشت ولی دائم ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @personal instructions, @service to others; to the Cause of God
